name: Blueberry Bear Claws
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together 4 tablespoons sugar, butter, and almond paste until thoroughly combined.
2. Gradually add the cookie crumbs, mixing well. Add milk to moisten and set aside.
3. Add the remaining sugar to the hot roll mix and prepare the dough according to package directions. Let it rest for 5 minutes.
4. Roll the dough into a 24 x 8 inch rectangle.
5. Spread almond paste evenly over the dough, then cover with blueberries.
6. Starting on the long side, roll up the dough, seal, and cut into 8 pieces that are approximately 3 inches long.
7. Make 4 evenly spaced slashes about halfway through each piece, then bend the rolls into a curve so the slashes open slightly.
8. Place the rolls on greased sheet pans and let them rise until doubled in size.
9. Brush the rolls with beaten egg.
10. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
11. Drizzle with lemon icing and garnish with sliced almonds.
